title: croton platyphyllus
intro: Croton platyphyllus, also known as Croton lechleri, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest in South America, and its bark is used for medicinal purposes. The bark of the plant has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Croton platyphyllus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Croton platyphyllus include capsules, extracts, and tinctures, which can be used to address various health concerns.
